message:
feat: add transcript search tools for recall sub-agent

Implemented SearchTranscript, ReadTurnsFromSnapshot, and FilterTurns
functions to enable programmatic exploration of session snapshot JSON files.
These tools will be used by the recall sub-agent (Task 5) to search through
session transcripts without making LLM calls.

Key features:
- SearchTranscript: case-insensitive full-text search with previews
- ReadTurnsFromSnapshot: range-based turn extraction with bounds clamping
- FilterTurns: multi-dimensional filtering by kind, content, and error status
- Helper functions for text extraction and error detection

All functions include comprehensive test coverage including edge cases,
invalid paths, empty transcripts, and bounds handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
